name: Asparagus with Mushrooms and Fresh Coriander
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the tough part of the asparagus stalk, about 2 to 3 inches from the bottom.
2. Using a vegetable peeler, scrape the asparagus to about 1 inch from the top.
3. Cut the asparagus into diagonal pieces measuring 1 inch in length.
4. Melt the butter in a nonstick frying pan over medium heat.
5. Add the mushrooms and cook, tossing and shaking until they are lightly browned.
6. Add the asparagus to the pan and stir for about 1 minute.
7. Add the shallots, salt, and black pepper (if using) to taste.
8. Sprinkle with chopped fresh coriander and continue cooking for an additional 30 seconds.
9. Serve and enjoy your meal!
